description_long: This wardrobe features a modern, minimalist design with a combination of light wood and white finishes. The front includes a tall mirrored door on the left, a vertical open cubby above, and a section with two vertical slats and hooks for hanging items. Below the slats is a small drawer with a recessed handle. The right side panel is solid and white, while the left and right edges are finished in light wood grain. The wardrobe stands on small feet and has a flat top surface suitable for placing small objects. The overall construction suggests a blend of particleboard or MDF with laminate surfaces, and the mirrored panel adds both functionality and visual interest.
description: A modern wardrobe with a mirrored door, open cubby, hanging hooks, and a small drawer, finished in light wood and white. It features both closed and open storage sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mirrored door, open cubby, hanging hooks, vertical slats, and a small drawer at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain light wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a mostly solid white back panel and the open section behind the vertical slats.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying a plain light wood panel similar to the left side.
